mechanism_narrative: Positive monthly momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and upward revisions to corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if rising RSAFS momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than the unconditional hit rate over three consecutive walk-forward years.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above a restrictive threshold raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation is rising while the federal funds rate is also increasing, markets price a higher probability of further tightening and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS tightening signal has nonnegative 60-day mean excess returns or a negative-return hit rate below 55% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing investors to mark down expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases across out-of-sample windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals expanding real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO momentum has a walk-forward rank correlation below 0.03 with 60-day S&P 500 returns for two consecutive three-year evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts crossing below a weak-activity threshold signals deterioration in rate-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside-threshold triggers have higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment rising while unemployment falls signals broad labor-market strength that supports income growth and near-term consumption, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS up and UNRATE down interaction fails to beat unconditional 20-day S&P 500 returns by at least 10 basis points on average out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity weakness confirmed by falling GDP and falling retail sales signals broad demand contraction and earnings risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint GDPC1 and RSAFS contraction signals are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations.
